title: LA1 3QY, Sofidel UK Limited: environmental permit issued - EPR/UP3237ES/V004
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit for:    Operator name: Sofidel UK Limited   Installation name: Lancaster (North) Paper Mill   Permit number: EPR/UP3237ES/V004   "
